# discord_role (Data Source)

Fetches a single Discord role within a guild by id.

## Example Usage

```terraform
data "discord_role" "moderator" {
  server_id = "123456789012345678"
  role_id   = "234567890123456789"
}

output "moderator_permissions" {
  value = data.discord_role.moderator.permissions
}
```

<!-- schema generated by tfplugindocs -->
## Schema

### Required

- `role_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the role.
- `server_id` (String) Snowflake ID of the guild.

### Read-Only

- `color` (Number) Decimal RGB color of the role.
- `hoist` (Boolean) Whether the role is displayed separately in the member list.
- `managed` (Boolean) Whether the role is managed by an integration.
- `mentionable` (Boolean) Whether the role is mentionable.
- `name` (String) Role name.
- `permissions` (String) Permission bitfield as a decimal string.
- `position` (Number) Position of the role in the hierarchy.
